examples.en: Solar power is a renewable source of energy.
examples.zh: 太陽能是一種可再生的能源。

examples.en: Taiwan is investing more in renewable energy.
examples.zh: 台灣正在增加對再生能源的投資。

img: wind turbines and solar panels field

examples.en: They installed solar panels on the roof.
examples.zh: 他們在屋頂上裝了太陽能板。

examples.en: Solar panels turn sunlight into electricity.
examples.zh: 太陽能板把陽光轉換成電力。

img: rooftop solar panels under blue sky

examples.en: The wind turbine spins in the strong breeze.
examples.zh: 風力發電機在強風中轉動。

examples.en: Offshore wind turbines produce clean power.
examples.zh: 離岸風力發電機產生乾淨的電力。

img: large white wind turbine on hill

examples.en: We need a sustainable way to use resources.
examples.zh: 我們需要一種永續利用資源的方式。

examples.en: Sustainable farming protects the soil.
examples.zh: 永續農業能保護土壤。

img: green city with plants and solar energy

examples.en: Cars produce a lot of carbon emissions.
examples.zh: 汽車會產生大量的碳排放。

examples.en: The country wants to cut carbon emissions.
examples.zh: 這個國家想要減少碳排放。

img: factory chimneys releasing smoke

examples.en: Flying less can reduce your carbon footprint.
examples.zh: 少搭飛機可以減少你的碳足跡。

examples.en: This app measures your daily carbon footprint.
examples.zh: 這個應用程式會測量你每天的碳足跡。

img: green footprint made of leaves

examples.en: Coal and oil are fossil fuels.
examples.zh: 煤和石油都是化石燃料。

examples.en: Burning fossil fuels pollutes the air.
examples.zh: 燃燒化石燃料會污染空氣。

img: coal pile and oil barrels

examples.en: Greenhouse gases trap heat in the air.
examples.zh: 溫室氣體會把熱能留在空氣中。

examples.en: Factories release many greenhouse gases.
examples.zh: 工廠排放許多溫室氣體。

img: earth surrounded by heat and smoke

examples.en: Climate change is a serious global problem.
examples.zh: 氣候變遷是嚴重的全球問題。

examples.en: Rising seas are a sign of climate change.
examples.zh: 海平面上升是氣候變遷的徵兆。

img: melting glacier and dry cracked land

examples.en: Global warming makes summers hotter.
examples.zh: 全球暖化讓夏天變得更熱。

examples.en: Scientists warn about global warming.
examples.zh: 科學家警告全球暖化的問題。

img: hot sun over melting ice caps

examples.en: The power plant supplies electricity to the city.
examples.zh: 這座發電廠供應城市的電力。

examples.en: A new power plant was built near the coast.
examples.zh: 海岸邊蓋了一座新的發電廠。

img: large industrial power plant with towers

examples.en: We use electricity to run our home.
examples.zh: 我們用電力來維持家中運作。

examples.en: The storm cut off the electricity.
examples.zh: 暴風雨中斷了電力供應。

img: glowing light bulb with power lines

examples.en: Wind can generate a lot of power.
examples.zh: 風可以產生大量的電力。

examples.en: The dam generates electricity for the region.
examples.zh: 這座水壩為該地區發電。

img: spinning generator producing sparks

examples.en: Hydropower comes from flowing water.
examples.zh: 水力發電來自流動的水。

examples.en: The dam is used for hydropower.
examples.zh: 這座水壩用來進行水力發電。

img: hydroelectric dam with rushing water

examples.en: Nuclear energy produces very little carbon.
examples.zh: 核能產生的碳非常少。

examples.en: Some people worry about nuclear energy safety.
examples.zh: 有些人擔心核能的安全性。

img: nuclear power plant cooling towers

examples.en: Geothermal energy comes from underground heat.
examples.zh: 地熱能來自地底下的熱能。

examples.en: Iceland uses geothermal power widely.
examples.zh: 冰島廣泛使用地熱發電。

img: steam rising from geothermal plant

examples.en: Biomass can be burned to make energy.
examples.zh: 生物質可以燃燒來製造能源。

examples.en: Wood is a common type of biomass.
examples.zh: 木材是常見的一種生物質。

img: wood chips and plant waste pile

examples.en: We bought an energy-saving fridge.
examples.zh: 我們買了一台節能冰箱。

examples.en: Energy-saving bulbs use less power.
examples.zh: 節能燈泡用電較少。

img: energy efficient light bulb with leaf

examples.en: This car is very fuel efficient.
examples.zh: 這台車非常省油。

examples.en: Efficient machines waste less energy.
examples.zh: 有效率的機器浪費較少能源。

img: efficiency gauge pointing to green

examples.en: Air conditioners consume a lot of power.
examples.zh: 冷氣機耗用大量電力。

examples.en: The city consumes more energy in summer.
examples.zh: 這座城市在夏天消耗更多能源。

img: electric meter spinning fast

examples.en: We tracked our energy consumption at home.
examples.zh: 我們追蹤家中的能源消耗量。

examples.en: Lower consumption saves money.
examples.zh: 降低消耗量能省錢。

img: energy usage chart on screen

examples.en: Turn off lights to conserve energy.
examples.zh: 關燈以節省能源。

examples.en: We should conserve water in summer.
examples.zh: 夏天我們應該節約用水。

img: hand turning off a light switch

examples.en: We should reduce our energy waste.
examples.zh: 我們應該減少能源浪費。

examples.en: Riding a bike reduces pollution.
examples.zh: 騎腳踏車能減少污染。

img: downward arrow over smoke cloud

examples.en: Please recycle your bottles and cans.
examples.zh: 請回收你的瓶子和罐子。

examples.en: Recycling saves energy and resources.
examples.zh: 回收能節省能源和資源。

img: recycling bins with sorted waste

examples.en: Electric cars store power in a battery.
examples.zh: 電動車把電力存在電池裡。

examples.en: The battery can be charged at night.
examples.zh: 電池可以在晚上充電。

img: large charged battery with lightning icon

examples.en: I need to charge my phone.
examples.zh: 我需要幫手機充電。

examples.en: You can charge the car at the station.
examples.zh: 你可以在充電站幫車子充電。

img: phone plugged into charger

examples.en: Solar power feeds into the grid.
examples.zh: 太陽能電力併入電網。

examples.en: A storm damaged the power grid.
examples.zh: 暴風雨損壞了電網。

img: electric power grid towers and lines

examples.en: Old cars emit more carbon.
examples.zh: 老舊的車排放更多碳。

examples.en: The factory emits dark smoke.
examples.zh: 這間工廠排放黑煙。

img: exhaust pipe releasing gas

examples.en: The company aims to be carbon neutral by 2030.
examples.zh: 這家公司目標在2030年達到碳中和。

examples.en: Planting trees helps us stay carbon neutral.
examples.zh: 種樹幫助我們維持碳中和。

img: balance scale with tree and factory

examples.en: We plant trees to offset our carbon.
examples.zh: 我們種樹來抵銷碳排放。

examples.en: The savings offset the extra cost.
examples.zh: 省下的錢抵銷了額外的花費。

img: tree balancing against smoke cloud

examples.en: Clean energy does not pollute the air.
examples.zh: 潔淨能源不會污染空氣。

examples.en: The town runs on clean energy.
examples.zh: 這座小鎮使用潔淨能源運作。

img: green landscape with wind and solar

examples.en: Electric vehicles are quieter than gas cars.
examples.zh: 電動車比汽油車安靜。

examples.en: More people are buying electric vehicles.
examples.zh: 越來越多人購買電動車。

img: electric car at charging station

examples.en: Gasoline is a common fuel for cars.
examples.zh: 汽油是汽車常用的燃料。

examples.en: This engine uses less fuel.
examples.zh: 這具引擎使用較少燃料。

img: fuel pump nozzle at gas station

examples.en: Air pollution harms our health.
examples.zh: 空氣污染危害我們的健康。

examples.en: Clean energy reduces pollution.
examples.zh: 潔淨能源能減少污染。

img: smoggy city skyline with haze

examples.en: Water is a precious natural resource.
examples.zh: 水是珍貴的天然資源。

examples.en: We must not waste our resources.
examples.zh: 我們不能浪費資源。

img: water sun and coal resource icons

examples.en: The company cares about sustainability.
examples.zh: 這家公司重視永續性。

examples.en: Sustainability means thinking about the future.
examples.zh: 永續性意味著為未來著想。

img: green globe held in caring hands

examples.en: Good insulation keeps the house warm.
examples.zh: 良好的隔熱能讓房子保暖。

examples.en: Insulation lowers our heating bills.
examples.zh: 隔熱能降低我們的暖氣費用。

img: house wall with insulation layers

examples.en: This bulb uses only ten watts.
examples.zh: 這顆燈泡只用十瓦。

examples.en: A higher watt means more power.
examples.zh: 瓦數越高代表功率越大。

img: light bulb showing wattage label

examples.en: The solar farm's output rises at noon.
examples.zh: 太陽能場的產出在中午升高。

examples.en: The plant increased its power output.
examples.zh: 這座發電廠提高了發電量。

img: power meter with rising output graph

examples.en: Climate change can cause longer droughts.
examples.zh: 氣候變遷可能造成更長的乾旱。

examples.en: The drought dried up the reservoir.
examples.zh: 乾旱使水庫乾涸。

img: dry cracked earth under hot sun

examples.en: Rising sea levels threaten coastal towns.
examples.zh: 海平面上升威脅沿海城鎮。

examples.en: The sea level has slowly gone up.
examples.zh: 海平面已經慢慢上升。

img: rising ocean water near a city coast

examples.en: Farmers must adapt to a warmer climate.
examples.zh: 農民必須適應更溫暖的氣候。

examples.en: Cities are adapting to rising seas.
examples.zh: 城市正在調適以因應海平面上升。

img: farmer adjusting to changing weather

examples.en: We use eco-friendly shopping bags.
examples.zh: 我們使用環保購物袋。

examples.en: This hotel is very eco-friendly.
examples.zh: 這家旅館非常環保。

img: green leaf product with earth symbol

examples.en: Electric trains can be emission-free.
examples.zh: 電動火車可以是零排放的。

examples.en: They promise an emission-free future.
examples.zh: 他們承諾一個零排放的未來。

img: clean electric bus with no exhaust

examples.en: Peak demand happens on hot afternoons.
examples.zh: 尖峰用電需求出現在炎熱的下午。

examples.en: The grid struggles during peak demand.
examples.zh: 電網在尖峰需求時很吃力。

img: electricity demand graph with high peak

examples.en: A blackout left the whole town dark.
examples.zh: 一次停電讓整個小鎮陷入黑暗。

examples.en: The heat wave caused a blackout.
examples.zh: 熱浪造成了停電。

img: dark city skyline during power outage

examples.en: The storm caused a power outage.
examples.zh: 暴風雨造成了停電。

examples.en: We used candles during the power outage.
examples.zh: 停電時我們用蠟燭。

img: candles lit in a dark room

examples.en: The energy transition takes many years.
examples.zh: 能源轉型需要許多年。

examples.en: Green jobs grow during the energy transition.
examples.zh: 綠色工作在能源轉型期間增加。

img: coal plant turning into wind farm

examples.en: A smart meter shows your power use in real time.
examples.zh: 智慧電表即時顯示你的用電量。

examples.en: Smart meters help families save energy.
examples.zh: 智慧電表幫助家庭節省能源。

img: digital smart meter on house wall

examples.en: We should choose a low-carbon lifestyle.
examples.zh: 我們應該選擇低碳的生活方式。

examples.en: Trains are a low-carbon way to travel.
examples.zh: 火車是一種低碳的旅行方式。

img: green city with bikes and clean transport
